$comment: Authoritative society / agency domains the medkit-guideline-curator may WebFetch from. Anything not on this list is blocked. The blocklist below is illustrative — the rule is allowlist-only, anything not allowlisted is rejected by default.
notes: Allowlist is enforced by intent — only fetch from these domains. If a candidate guideline lives elsewhere, set verificationStatus 'needs-verification' and stop.
PDF-only sources may fail to parse via WebFetch. When that happens, do NOT fall back on training memory — flag the entry, leave the recommendation list empty, and explain in `notes`.
Recommendation text MUST be verbatim from the primary document. Press releases and pocket cards do not count.
